title: Senior Teacher - Osmania University - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - Osmania University - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Osmania University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Coimbatore-based team.

About Osmania University:
Osmania University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in E-learning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University!
